orders_psp_fields_null_when_none.name: orders_psp_fields_null_when_none
orders_psp_fields_null_when_none.value:
"orders"."payment_provider" <> 'none' OR (
        "orders"."psp_charge_id" IS NULL AND
        "orders"."psp_payment_method" IS NULL AND
        "orders"."psp_status_reason" IS NULL
      )

orders_shipping_null_when_not_required_c.name: orders_shipping_null_when_not_required_chk
orders_shipping_null_when_not_required_c.value:
"orders"."shipping_required" IS TRUE
    OR (
      "orders"."shipping_provider" IS NULL
      AND "orders"."shipping_method_code" IS NULL
      AND "orders"."shipping_status" IS NULL
    )

orders_shipping_present_when_required_ch.name: orders_shipping_present_when_required_chk
orders_shipping_present_when_required_ch.value:
"orders"."shipping_required" IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    OR (
      "orders"."shipping_provider" IS NOT NULL
      AND "orders"."shipping_method_code" IS NOT NULL
      AND "orders"."shipping_status" IS NOT NULL
    )

orders_shipping_payer_present_when_requi.name: orders_shipping_payer_present_when_required_chk
orders_shipping_payer_present_when_requi.value: "orders"."shipping_required" IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE OR "orders"."shipping_payer" IS NOT NULL

orders_terminal_shipping_status_chk.name: orders_terminal_shipping_status_chk
orders_terminal_shipping_status_chk.value:
(
          "orders"."payment_status" NOT IN ('failed', 'refunded')
          AND "orders"."status" NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'INVENTORY_FAILED')
        )
        OR (
          "orders"."shipping_status" IS NULL
          OR "orders"."shipping_status" IN ('cancelled', 'delivered')
        )
